description_long: This armchair features a deep, rich burgundy leather upholstery with a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The seat and backrest are generously padded, providing a plush and comfortable sitting experience. The backrest is tall and gently curved, seamlessly integrated with the seat for a modern, minimalist look. The armchair lacks traditional armrests, giving it an open and accessible design. It stands on four slender, black metal legs with a subtle outward curve, adding stability and a contemporary touch. The overall construction suggests a sturdy frame, likely with internal cushioning and support materials for durability and comfort.
description: A modern burgundy leather armchair with a tall, padded backrest, no armrests, and slender black metal legs. The upholstery is smooth and slightly glossy, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, padded seat and backrest, with the absence of armrests and the curved black metal legs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, plush seat and tall, smooth backrest, with both legs visible and no armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, again showing the seat and backrest profile and the metal legs.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full height and width of the backrest, with the curved black metal legs visible at the base.
attribute_backrest_style: tall, wide, gently curved, smooth and padded
